context: Tests whether the agent designs the dropshipping database schema with correct column types, constraints, and structure for suppliers, supplier_products, and dropship_orders tables. Verifies that key design decisions like UUID primary keys, cents-based pricing, correct status enumerations, and encryption annotations are applied correctly.

checklist.name: UUID primary keys
checklist.description: All three tables (suppliers, supplier_products, dropship_orders) use UUID as primary key type with gen_random_uuid() default

checklist.name: order_method check constraint
checklist.description: The suppliers table order_method column has a CHECK constraint with exactly these four values: 'api', 'email', 'edi', 'csv_ftp'

checklist.name: cost_price as integer cents
checklist.description: cost_price column in supplier_products is defined as INTEGER (not DECIMAL or NUMERIC), representing price in cents

checklist.name: dropship_orders status constraint
checklist.description: The dropship_orders status column has a CHECK constraint with exactly: 'pending', 'submitted', 'confirmed', 'shipped', 'failed'

checklist.name: api_key encryption annotation
checklist.description: The suppliers.api_key column includes a comment or annotation indicating it is encrypted at rest (e.g., SQL comment '-- encrypted at rest' or equivalent)

checklist.name: lead_time_days column
checklist.description: The suppliers table includes a lead_time_days column (INTEGER, NOT NULL, DEFAULT 2)

checklist.name: supplier_sku column
checklist.description: The supplier_products table includes a supplier_sku column to store the supplier's own SKU identifier (separate from product_id)

checklist.name: last_synced_at column
checklist.description: The supplier_products table includes a last_synced_at column with TIMESTAMPTZ type for tracking when inventory was last synced

checklist.name: supplier_order_ref column
checklist.description: The dropship_orders table includes a supplier_order_ref column to store the supplier's own order reference/confirmation number

checklist.name: total_cost as integer
checklist.description: The dropship_orders.total_cost column is defined as INTEGER (cents), not a floating point or decimal type

checklist.name: is_active default true
checklist.description: The suppliers table includes an is_active BOOLEAN column with DEFAULT true

checklist.name: Foreign key references
checklist.description: supplier_products.supplier_id references suppliers(id) and supplier_products.product_id references products(id); dropship_orders.order_id references orders(id) and dropship_orders.supplier_id references suppliers(id)
